entity.name: Prayas Abhinav
entity.description: Koher is an open-source practice that builds free AI tools separating language from judgment. AI reads input and narrates output. Deterministic code handles all judgment. Tools are free, MIT-licensed, and require no login. Built by a teacher for students.

projects.name: Coherence Diagnostic
projects.description: Analyses design writing for structural coherence across five dimensions (claim, evidence, scope, assumptions, gaps). A fine-tuned DeBERTa model qualifies input, deterministic rules judge severity, Claude Haiku narrates the diagnosis. 98.38% classification accuracy.

projects.name: Play Shape Diagnostic
projects.description: Maps the structural shape of play concepts across six dimensions. Human selection replaces AI classification at the qualification stage. Embedding-based relationship rules surface patterns. Narrative generation from pre-computed similarities.

projects.name: Fragment Mapper
projects.description: Shows structural relationships between scattered text fragments. Four orthogonal signals (embedding similarity, TF-IDF distinctiveness, VADER sentiment, lexical profile) feed six deterministic rules that surface neighbours, strays, rifts, forks, echoes, and shifts. No content generated. No evaluation.

channels.description: Bank transfer — contact hello@koher.app for details

plans.name: Monthly sustainer
plans.description: Covers server hosting, API costs, and domain renewals for all deployed tools

plans.name: One-time contribution
plans.description: Any amount. Goes directly to infrastructure and intern stipends.

history.description: Server hosting (2 droplets), API costs (OpenRouter, HF), 4 domains
